title: pistacia lentiscus var. angustifolia
intro: Pistacia lentiscus var. angustifolia, also known as Mastichochryson or the Chios Mastic Tree, is a variety of the lentisk tree native to the Greek island of Chios. It is valued for its resinous bark, which has been used for centuries in traditional medicine to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Pistacia lentiscus var. angustifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the resin is often extracted and used as an essential oil or in the form of capsules, tinctures, and creams to harness its medicinal properties.
